title: Adjusting Certain Delegations Under the Defense Production Act
summary: Executive Order 14391, issued on March 13, 2026, amends Executive Order 13603 concerning National Defense Resources Preparedness. It adjusts delegations of authority under the Defense Production Act by adding the Secretary of Energy, alongside the Secretary of Commerce, to exercise certain delegated authorities independently. The order also clarifies that agency heads are not required to recommend actions to the President if they already possess the authority through delegation. This aims to streamline decision-making and avoid unnecessary recommendations when authority is already vested in an agency head.
